interface.shortDescription: Prepare HRA online register applications with notary readiness guardrails.
interface.longDescription: Local HRA-first Handelsregister companion for preparing online register application packages, notary video-procedure readiness, eID/app prerequisites, approval checkpoints and metadata-only evidence. For notary-side filing workflows it depends on the NoC BNotK XNP authentication gate first. It does not retrieve register data or automate protected portals.
defaultPrompt: Prepare an HRA online register application after the XNP gate.
Create evidence metadata for an HRA filing.
